name: VIVIC CORP.
business: VIVIC CORP. is a global yacht sales and service provider based in Taiwan, designing and selling yachts under the VIVIC brand to yacht marinas, yacht clubs, yacht operators, and marine tourism providers. It also acts as the exclusive distributor of Monte Fino yachts in China, the Philippines, and the Middle East.

exposures.sentence: We recently entered into an Electric Catamaran Yacht Co-Development Agreement with Acel Power Inc. to collaborate on the development of an electric yacht.
